message.content:
Explore the project at C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\WELD_MONITOR3_IAM to find ALL MELSEC PLC / Ethernet communication related code that needs to be removed. The user wants to keep only Arduino IO signal handling and remove all PLC/Ethernet stuff.

Search for:
1. MelsecHelper.cs - full file
2. All references to MelsecHelper, _plc, plcTimer, PlcTimer, TrdPlc, ThreadTaskPlc in all .cs files
3. All references to signalSource, "MELSEC", plcInput, plcOutput, plcIpAddress, plcCompletePulseAddress in GlobalValues.cs, Configuration.cs, _FrmMain.cs
4. _FrmPlcIO.cs - full file (PLC I/O display form)
5. Any PLC-related UI elements (buttons, menus) in Designer.cs files
6. PLC-related INI settings in config_default.ini
7. PLC-related entries in packages.config or csproj

Give me a comprehensive list of files and specific code sections that reference PLC/MELSEC/Ethernet so we know exactly what to remove.

content.text: 나는 WELD_MONITOR3_IAM 프로젝트를 탐색하여 PLC/Ethernet 관련 코드를 찾겠습니다.
더 많은 파일을 확인하고 MelsecHelper.cs, 관련 참조들, 그리고 PLC IO 폼을 찾겠습니다.
이제 전체 cs 파일들을 검색하여 PLC/MELSEC 관련 참조를 찾겠습니다.

content.text: 이제 GlobalValues.cs, Configuration.cs, _FrmMain.cs, _FrmConfiguration.cs 파일들을 읽어 PLC 관련 코드를 찾겠습니다.

content.content:
1→using System;
     2→using System.Collections.Generic;
     3→using System.Linq;
     4→using System.ComponentModel;
     5→using System.Text;
     6→using System.Threading.Tasks;
     7→using System.Windows.Forms;
     8→
     9→namespace WeldMonitor3
    10→{
    11→    /// <summary>
    12→    /// 다국어 지원 Category Attribute
    13→    /// SPOT 모드일 때 대체 이름 지원
    14→    /// </summary>
    15→    public class LocalizedCategoryAttribute : CategoryAttribute
    16→    {
    17→        private readonly string _korName;
    18→        private readonly string _engName;
    19→        private readonly string _korNameSpot;
    20→        private readonly string _engNameSpot;
    21→
    22→        public LocalizedCategoryAttribute(string korName, string engName) : base(korName)
    23→        {
    24→            _korName = korName;
    25→            _engName = engName;
    26→            _korNameSpot = korName;
    27→            _engNameSpot = engName;
    28→        }
    29→
    30→        /// <summary>
    31→        /// SPOT 모드일 때 대체 카테고리명 지정
    32→        /// </summary>
    33→        public LocalizedCategoryAttribute(string korName, string engName, string korNameSpot, string engNameSpot) : base(korName)
    34→        {
    35→            _korName = korName;
    36→            _engName = engName;
    37→            _korNameSpot = korNameSpot;
    38→            _engNameSpot = engNameSpot;
    39→        }
    40→
    41→        protected override string GetLocalizedString(string value)
    42→        {
    43→            bool isSpot = GlobalValues.weldMode == "SPOT";
    44→            if (GlobalValues.language == "English")
    45→                return isSpot ? _engNameSpot : _engName;
    46→            else
    47→                return isSpot ? _korNameSpot : _korName;
    48→        }
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    /// <summary>
    52→    /// 다국어 지원 DisplayName Attribute
    53→    /// </summary>
    54→    public class LocalizedDisplayNameAttribute : DisplayNameAttribute
    55→    {
    56→        private readonly string _korName;
    57→        private readonly string _engName;
    58→
    59→        public LocalizedDisplayNameAttribute(string korName, string engName) : base(korName)
    60→        {
    61→            _korName = korName;
    62→            _engName = engName;
    63→        }
    64→
    65→        public override string DisplayName
    66→        {
    67→            get { return GlobalValues.language == "English" ? _engName : _korName; }
    68→        }
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    public class Configuration : ICustomTypeDescriptor
    72→    {
    73→        #region ICustomTypeDescriptor 구현 (PLC 모드일 때만 블록 설정 표시)
    74→
    75→        public AttributeCollection GetAttributes() => TypeDescriptor.GetAttributes(this, true);
    76→        public string GetClassName() => TypeDescriptor.GetClassName(this, true);
    77→        public string GetComponentName() => TypeDescriptor.GetComponentName(this, true);
    78→        public TypeConverter GetConverter() => TypeDescriptor.GetConverter(this, true);
    79→        public EventDescriptor GetDefaultEvent() => TypeDescriptor.GetDefaultEvent(this, true);
    80→        public PropertyDescriptor GetDefaultProperty() => TypeDescriptor.GetDefaultProperty(this, true);
    81→        public object GetEditor(Type editorBaseType) => TypeDescriptor.GetEditor(this, editorBaseType, true);
    82→        public EventDescriptorCollection GetEvents() => TypeDescriptor.GetEvents(this, true);
    83→        public EventDescriptorCollection GetEvents(Attribute[] attributes) => TypeDescriptor.GetEvents(this, attributes, true);
    84→        public object GetPropertyOwner(PropertyDescriptor pd) => this;
    85→
    86→        public PropertyDescriptorCollection GetProperties() => GetProperties(null);
    87→
    88→        public PropertyDescriptorCollection GetProperties(Attribute[] attributes)
    89→        {
    90→            var props = TypeDescriptor.GetProperties(this, attributes, true);
    91→            var filtered = new List<PropertyDescriptor>();
    92→
    93→            foreach (PropertyDescriptor prop in props)
    94→            {
    95→                // PLC 모드가 아니면 plcIpAddress, plcInputBlocks, plcOutputBlocks, plcCompletePulseAddress 숨김
    96→                if (signalSource != "MELSEC PLC" &&
    97→                    (prop.Name == "plcIpAddress" || prop.Name == "plcInputBlocks" || prop.Name == "plcOutputBlocks" || prop.Name == "plcCompletePulseAddress"))
    98→                {
    99→                    continue;
   100→                }
   101→
   102→                // SPOT 모드가 아니면 SPOT 전용 설정 숨김
   103→                if (weldMode != "SPOT" &&
   104→                    (prop.Name == "spotWeldThreshold" || prop.Name == "spotUseVolt" || prop.Name == "spotUseFlow"))
   105→                {
   106→                    continue;
   107→                }
   108→
   109→                filtered.Add(prop);
   110→            }
   111→
   112→            return new PropertyDescriptorCollection(filtered.ToArray());
   113→        }
   114→
   115→        #endregion
   116→
   117→        [LocalizedCategory("시리얼 포트", "Serial Port")]
   118→        [LocalizedDisplayName("스캐너", "Scanner")]
   119→        [Description("[English] Barcode scanner serial ports (Read-only)\n" +
   120→            "• Click [SCANNER] button on the right to edit\n\n" +
   121→            "[한글] 바코드 스캐너 시리얼 포트 (읽기 전용)\n" +
   122→            "• 우측 [스캐너] 버튼을 클릭하여 편집")]

   135→        [LocalizedCategory("시리얼 포트", "Serial Port")]

   332→            "[한글] 입력 신호용 PLC D 레지스터 블록\n" +
   333→            "• 형식: 시작번지_개수 (여러 블록은 ' / '로 구분)\n" +
   334→            "• 예: 4008_12 / 4200_5 → D4008~D4019, D4200~D4204")]
   335→        public string plcInputBlocks { get; set; }
   336→
   337→        [LocalizedCategory("PLC 설정", "PLC Settings")]
   338→        [LocalizedDisplayName("출력 블록", "Output Blocks")]
   339→        [Description("[English] PLC D register blocks for output signals\n" +
   340→            "• Format: StartAddress_Count (multiple blocks separated by ' / ')\n" +
   341→            "• Example: 5000_1 / 5100_2 → D5000, D5100~D5101\n" +
   342→            "• NG Hold uses the first word of the first block (e.g. 5000_1 → D5000).\n\n" +
   343→            "[한글] 출력 신호용 PLC D 레지스터 블록\n" +
   344→            "• 형식: 시작번지_개수 (여러 블록은 ' / '로 구분)\n" +
   345→            "• 예: 5000_1 / 5100_2 → D5000, D5100~D5101\n" +
   346→            "• MELSEC 시 NG 홀드는 [출력 블록] 첫 번째 번지(Dxxxx)로 출력")]
   347→        public string plcOutputBlocks { get; set; }
   348→
   349→        [LocalizedCategory("PLC 설정", "PLC Settings")]
   350→        [LocalizedDisplayName("완료 펄스 번지", "Complete Pulse Address")]
   351→        [Description("[English] D register address for completion response pulse (1 sec)\n" +
   352→            "• When PLC sends completion signal (input block offset 2), this address outputs 1 sec pulse\n" +
   353→            "• Default: 5010\n\n" +
   354→            "[한글] 완료 신호 응답용 1초 펄스 출력 D 번지\n" +
   355→            "• PLC 완료 신호(입력 블록 오프셋 2) 수신 시 이 번지에 1초 펄스 출력\n" +
   356→            "• 기본값: 5010")]
   357→        public int plcCompletePulseAddress { get; set; } = 5010;
   358→
   359→        // ===== 용접 모드 설정 =====
   360→        [LocalizedCategory("용접 모드", "Weld Mode")]
   361→        [LocalizedDisplayName("모드", "Mode")]
   362→        [Description("[English] Weld mode selection\n" +
   363→            "• CO2: CO2 welding (Amp/Volt/Flow, uses DI signal for weld detection)\n" +
   364→            "• SPOT: Spot welding (Amp/Temp/Air, uses current threshold for weld detection)\n\n" +
   365→            "[한글] 용접 모드 선택\n" +
   366→            "• CO2: CO2 용접 (전류/전압/유량, DI 신호로 용접 감지)\n" +
   367→            "• SPOT: 스팟 용접 (전류/온도/공압, 전류 임계값으로 용접 감지)")]
   368→        [TypeConverter(typeof(WeldModeConverter))]
   369→        public string weldMode { get; set; }
   370→
   371→        [LocalizedCategory("용접 모드", "Weld Mode")]
   372→        [LocalizedDisplayName("용접 감지 임계값(A)", "Weld Threshold(A)")]
   373→        [Description("[English] Current threshold for weld detection (SPOT mode only)\n" +
   374→            "• When current exceeds this value, welding is considered started\n" +
   375→            "• When current drops below this value, welding is considered ended\n" +
   376→            "• Default: 2000A\n\n" +
   377→            "[한글] 용접 감지 전류 임계값 (SPOT 모드 전용)\n" +
   378→            "• 전류가 이 값을 초과하면 용접 시작으로 판단\n" +
   379→            "• 전류가 이 값 미만으로 떨어지면 용접 종료로 판단\n" +
   380→            "• 기본값: 2.0kA")]
   381→        public double spotWeldThreshold { get; set; }
   382→
   383→        [LocalizedCategory("용접 모드", "Weld Mode")]
   384→        [LocalizedDisplayName("온도 사용", "Use Temp")]
   385→        [Description("[English] Enable temperature measurement (SPOT mode only)\n" +
   386→            "• true: Show temperature graph and measure coolant temperature\n" +
   387→            "• false: Hide temperature graph\n\n" +
   388→            "[한글] 온도 측정 사용 (SPOT 모드 전용)\n" +
   389→            "• true: 온도 그래프 표시 및 냉각수 온도 측정\n" +
   390→            "• false: 온도 그래프 숨김")]
   391→        public bool spotUseVolt { get; set; }
   392→
   393→        [LocalizedCategory("용접 모드", "Weld Mode")]
   394→        [LocalizedDisplayName("공압 사용", "Use Air")]
   395→        [Description("[English] Enable air pressure measurement (SPOT mode only)\n" +
   396→            "• true: Show air pressure graph and measure pneumatic pressure\n" +
   397→            "• false: Hide air pressure graph\n\n" +
   398→            "[한글] 공압 측정 사용 (SPOT 모드 전용)\n" +
   399→            "• true: 공압 그래프 표시 및 공압 측정\n" +
   400→            "• false: 공압 그래프 숨김")]
   401→        public bool spotUseFlow { get; set; }
   402→
   403→        public Configuration()
   404→        {
   405→            // 스캐너/프린터 포트 (읽기 전용 표시)
   406→            ScannerPorts = string.IsNullOrEmpty(GlobalValues.scannerPorts) ? "(없음)" : GlobalValues.scannerPorts;
   407→            PrinterPorts = string.IsNullOrEmpty(GlobalValues.printerPorts) ? "(없음)" : GlobalValues.printerPorts;
   408→
   409→            AduionoPort = GlobalValues.aduinoPort;
   410→            AduinoSwVer = GlobalValues.aduinoSwVer;
   411→
   412→            strPassWord = GlobalValues.strPassWord;
   413→
   414→            VoltGraphMin = Volt.GraphMin;
   415→            VoltGraphMax = Volt.GraphMax;
   416→
   417→            AmpGraphMin = Amp.GraphMin;
   418→            AmpGraphMax = Amp.GraphMax;
   419→
   420→            FlowGraphMin = Flow.GraphMin;
   421→            FlowGraphMax = Flow.GraphMax;
   422→
   423→            Alpha = GlobalValues.alpha;
   424→
   425→            holdoption = GlobalValues.HoldOption;
   426→            holdsignal = GlobalValues.HoldSignal;
   427→
   428→            strtitle = GlobalValues.strTitle;
   429→            language = GlobalValues.language;
   430→            useImageFeature = GlobalValues.useImageFeature ? "use" : "not use";
   431→
   432→            // PLC 설정
   433→            signalSource = GlobalValues.signalSource;
   434→            plcIpAddress = GlobalValues.plcIpAddress;
   435→            plcInputBlocks = GlobalValues.plcInputBlocks;
   436→            plcOutputBlocks = GlobalValues.plcOutputBlocks;
   437→            plcCompletePulseAddress = GlobalValues.plcCompletePulseAddress;
   438→
   439→            // 용접 모드 설정
   440→            weldMode = GlobalValues.weldMode;
   441→            spotWeldThreshold = GlobalValues.spotWeldThreshold;
   442→            spotUseVolt = GlobalValues.spotUseVolt;
   443→            spotUseFlow = GlobalValues.spotUseFlow;
   444→        }
   445→
   446→        public void Apply()
   447→        {
   448→            if (Alpha < 0.1 || Alpha > 1.0)
   449→            {
   450→                MessageBox.Show(Form.ActiveForm, LanguageManager.Get("msg_alpha_invalid"), LanguageManager.Get("msg_invalid_value"), MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
   451→                return;
   452→            }
   453→
   454→            // 기존 언어 저장 (변경 감지용)
   455→            string oldLanguage = GlobalValues.language;
   456→
   457→            GlobalValues.aduinoPort = AduionoPort;
   458→            GlobalValues.aduinoSwVer = AduinoSwVer;
   459→
   460→            GlobalValues.strPassWord = strPassWord;
   461→
   462→            Volt.GraphMin = VoltGraphMin;
   463→            Volt.GraphMax = VoltGraphMax;
   464→
   465→            Amp.GraphMin = AmpGraphMin;
   466→            Amp.GraphMax = AmpGraphMax;
   467→
   468→            Flow.GraphMin = FlowGraphMin;
   469→            Flow.GraphMax = FlowGraphMax;
   470→
   471→            GlobalValues.alpha = Alpha;
   472→            GlobalValues.HoldOption = holdoption;
   473→            GlobalValues.HoldSignal = holdsignal;
   474→
   475→            GlobalValues.strTitle = strtitle;
   476→            GlobalValues.language = language;
   477→
   478→            // 이미지 기능 설정 변경
   479→            bool oldUseImageFeature = GlobalValues.useImageFeature;
   480→            GlobalValues.useImageFeature = (useImageFeature == "use");
   481→
   482→            // 언어가 변경되었으면 모든 열려있는 폼의 언어 즉시 적용
   483→            if (oldLanguage != language)
   484→            {
   485→                ApplyLanguageToAllForms();
   486→            }
   487→
   488→            // 이미지 기능 설정이 변경되었으면 레이아웃 적용
   489→            if (oldUseImageFeature != GlobalValues.useImageFeature)
   490→            {
   491→                ApplyImageFeatureLayoutToMainForm();
   492→            }
   493→
   494→            // PLC 설정 적용
   495→            GlobalValues.signalSource = signalSource;
   496→            GlobalValues.plcIpAddress = plcIpAddress;
   497→            GlobalValues.plcInputBlocks = plcInputBlocks;
   498→            GlobalValues.plcOutputBlocks = plcOutputBlocks;
   499→            GlobalValues.plcCompletePulseAddress = plcCompletePulseAddress;
   500→
   501→            // 용접 모드 설정 적용
   502→            GlobalValues.weldMode = weldMode;
   503→            GlobalValues.spotWeldThreshold = spotWeldThreshold;
   504→            bool oldSpotUseVolt = GlobalValues.spotUseVolt;
   505→            bool oldSpotUseFlow = GlobalValues.spotUseFlow;
   506→            GlobalValues.spotUseVolt = spotUseVolt;
   507→            GlobalValues.spotUseFlow = spotUseFlow;
   508→
   509→            // SPOT 모드에서 Volt/Flow 사용 설정이 변경되었으면 그래프 레이아웃 적용
   510→            if (weldMode == "SPOT" && (oldSpotUseVolt != spotUseVolt || oldSpotUseFlow != spotUseFlow))
   511→            {
   512→                ApplyGraphLayoutToMainForm();
   513→            }
   514→        }
   515→
   516→        private void ApplyLanguageToAllForms()
   517→        {
   518→            // Application.OpenForms는 열려있는 모든 폼을 반환
   519→            foreach (Form form in Application.OpenForms)
   520→            {
   521→                // 리플렉션으로 ApplyLanguage 메서드가 있는지 확인하고 호출
   522→                var method = form.GetType().GetMethod("ApplyLanguage",
   523→                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic |
   524→                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public |
   525→                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
   526→
   527→                if (method != null)
   528→                {
   529→                    method.Invoke(form, null);
   530→                }
   531→            }
   532→        }
   533→
   534→        private void ApplyImageFeatureLayoutToMainForm()
   535→        {
   536→            // 메인 폼 찾아서 ApplyImageFeatureLayout 호출
   537→            foreach (Form form in Application.OpenForms)
   538→            {
   539→                if (form.GetType().Name == "_FrmMain")
   540→                {
   541→                    var method = form.GetType().GetMethod("ApplyImageFeatureLayout",
   542→                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic |
   543→                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public |
   544→                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
   545→
   546→                    if (method != null)
   547→                    {
   548→                        method.Invoke(form, null);
   549→                    }
   550→                    break;
   551→                }
   552→            }
   553→        }
   554→
   555→        private void ApplyGraphLayoutToMainForm()
   556→        {
   557→            // 메인 폼 찾아서 ApplyGraphLayout 호출
   558→            foreach (Form form in Application.OpenForms)
   559→            {
   560→                if (form.GetType().Name == "_FrmMain")
   561→                {
   562→                    var method = form.GetType().GetMethod("ApplyGraphLayout",
   563→                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic |
   564→                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public |
   565→                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
   566→
   567→                    if (method != null)
   568→                    {
   569→                        method.Invoke(form, null);
   570→                    }
   571→                    break;
   572→                }
   573→            }
   574→        }
   575→
   576→        private class ComPortComboConverter1 : StringConverter
   577→        {   
   578→            public override bool GetStandardValuesSupported(ITypeDescriptorContext context) => true;
   579→                public override bool GetStandardValuesExclusive(ITypeDescriptorContext context) => true;
   580→                public override StandardValuesCollection GetStandardValues(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   581→                {
   582→                    var comPorts = Enumerable.Range(1, 10).Select(i => $"COM{i}").ToArray();
   583→                    return new StandardValuesCollection(comPorts);
   584→                }
   585→            }
   586→        }
   587→        public class HoldOptionConverter : StringConverter
   588→        {
   589→            public override bool GetStandardValuesSupported(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   590→            {
   591→                return true;
   592→            }
   593→
   594→            public override bool GetStandardValuesExclusive(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   595→            {
   596→                return true; // true면 콤보박스에서만 선택 가능, false면 직접 입력도 가능
   597→            }
   598→
   599→            public override StandardValuesCollection GetStandardValues(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   600→            {
   601→                return new StandardValuesCollection(new[]
   602→                {
   603→                "use",
   604→                "not use"
   605→                });
   606→            }
   607→        }
   608→
   609→        public class AduinoSwVerConverter : StringConverter
   610→        {
   611→            public override bool GetStandardValuesSupported(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   612→            {
   613→                return true;
   614→            }
   615→
   616→            public override bool GetStandardValuesExclusive(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   617→            {
   618→                return true;
   619→            }
   620→
   621→            public override StandardValuesCollection GetStandardValues(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   622→            {
   623→                return new StandardValuesCollection(new[]
   624→                {
   625→                    "1.0",
   626→                    "2.0"
   627→                });
   628→            }
   629→        }
   630→
   631→        public class LanguageConverter : StringConverter
   632→        {
   633→            public override bool GetStandardValuesSupported(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   634→            {
   635→                return true;
   636→            }
   637→
   638→            public override bool GetStandardValuesExclusive(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   639→            {
   640→                return true;
   641→            }
   642→
   643→            public override StandardValuesCollection GetStandardValues(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   644→            {
   645→                return new StandardValuesCollection(new[]
   646→                {
   647→                    "한글",
   648→                    "English"
   649→                });
   650→            }
   651→        }
   652→
   653→        public class UseImageFeatureConverter : StringConverter
   654→        {
   655→            public override bool GetStandardValuesSupported(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   656→            {
   657→                return true;
   658→            }
   659→
   660→            public override bool GetStandardValuesExclusive(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   661→            {
   662→                return true;
   663→            }
   664→
   665→            public override StandardValuesCollection GetStandardValues(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   666→            {
   667→                return new StandardValuesCollection(new[]
   668→                {
   669→                    "use",
   670→                    "not use"
   671→                });
   672→            }
   673→        }
   674→
   675→        public class SignalSourceConverter : StringConverter
   676→        {
   677→            public override bool GetStandardValuesSupported(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   678→            {
   679→                return true;
   680→            }
   681→
   682→            public override bool GetStandardValuesExclusive(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   683→            {
   684→                return true;
   685→            }
   686→
   687→            public override StandardValuesCollection GetStandardValues(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   688→            {
   689→                return new StandardValuesCollection(new[]
   690→                {
   691→                    "Arduino IO",
   692→                    "MELSEC PLC"
   693→                });
   694→            }
   695→        }
   696→
   697→        public class WeldModeConverter : StringConverter
   698→        {
   699→            public override bool GetStandardValuesSupported(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   700→            {
   701→                return true;
   702→            }
   703→
   704→            public override bool GetStandardValuesExclusive(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   705→            {
   706→                return true;
   707→            }
   708→
   709→            public override StandardValuesCollection GetStandardValues(ITypeDescriptorContext context)
   710→            {
   711→                return new StandardValuesCollection(new[]
   712→                {
   713→                    "CO2",
   714→                    "SPOT"
   715→                });
   716→            }
   717→        }
   718→
   719→}
   720→

content.text: 이제 _FrmJig.cs와 _FrmMain.Designer.cs에서 PLC 관련 UI 요소들을 찾겠습니다.
완벽합니다. 이제 csproj의 COM 참조 부분도 보겠습니다.
